intro: The most concrete split between Chargebee and Orb is the pricing model: Chargebee runs on hybrid pricing from $599/mo (Performance), with a free tier, while Orb uses usage-based pricing from $1. That shapes how predictable your monthly spend is and how much of the cost sits in infrastructure versus per-seat or per-event fees. Beyond the headline, Chargebee carries medium lock-in (medium — deep integrations, underandwithon logic) and hybrid pricing from $599/mo (Performance), with a free tier; Orb carries medium lock-in (billing data exportable) and usage-based pricing from $1. Chargebee is a fit when you are saas. Orb is a fit when you are saas. The honest trade-off: Chargebee is explicitly not for simple projects; Orb is explicitly not for simple projects. On the product side, Chargebee is described as Subscription and revenue management platform supporting SaaS, e-commerce, and box subscriptions with Stripe and Braintree, and Orb is described as Developer-first subscription and usage billing platform with a flexible pricing model API and Stripe-compatible webhooks.
quick_take: Chargebee is for saas; Orb is for saas; decide on pricing model.
verdict_a: Choose Chargebee if you need a free tier to start before committing budget, and your use case matches saas.
verdict_b: Choose Orb if its usage pricing model fits your budget shape better than Chargebee's hybrid model, and you are saas.

faq.a: Chargebee starts at $599/mo (Performance); Orb starts at $1. On entry price alone that is the comparison, but real cost scales with users, events or volume, which the entry prices do not capture. Check each vendor's full tier list before committing.

faq.q: Can I migrate from Chargebee to Orb?
faq.a: Migration from Chargebee to Orb is feasible but not trivial: Chargebee has medium lock-in (medium — deep integrations, underandwithon logic). Core data can move; integrations and workflow logic need rebuild. Allow for a parallel-run period.

Both tools tie at 5/5 for developer experience on our scoring. The real difference will show up in your specific workflow, not the headline rating. A one-hour spike on both is the fastest way to decide.

faq.q: Is Orb a good alternative to Chargebee?
faq.a: Orb targets the same best-fit audience as Chargebee (saas). Note that Orb is explicitly not for simple projects, so it only replaces Chargebee if you are outside that exclusion. Pricing models differ (hybrid vs usage), which may shift total cost.
